name: Maze Warden Poleaxe
description: It is said that in the very heart of the desert between Hazzun and Al-Qaza lies the Labyrinth, guarded by silent warriors. Whatever is kept within remains secret, for no one who entered it has ever returned alive and sane.
descriptionZh: 迷宫据说位于沙海中央，介于哈尊和阿卡扎之间，有无声的战士镇守。隐匿其中的秘密至今无人知晓，因为进去的人要么根本没能回来，就算回来了，也神智失常，无一例外。
